TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Melvin_Booker, title = Melvin_Booker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Melvin_Booker} }

S.FORM: Melvin Booker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1972, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 8, Melvin Booker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Melvin Booker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1972, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 8, Melvin Booker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mel*in βooker s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mel*in βooker, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
